central_rule: GitHub is the ONLY communication channel. No AI talks to another AI directly. All state lives in this repo under VEDABOSS/.

exclusive_powers: Integrate approved output into main monorepo
Reassign tasks when an engine is unavailable
Break large tasks into smaller sub-tasks
Update AI_ENGINES.json availability for all engines
must_not_do: Write application code (only coordination, board updates, integration commits)

claude_code.note: VEDABOSS session — assign and coordinate only

cursor.note: Session stopped by user. Steps 1-2/9 done locally, not pushed.

codex.note: Waiting for T-D1-001 to complete before QC review

when_limit_hit: 1. Finish saving any in-progress files to your agent output/ directory
2. Update this file: set token_status='exhausted', status='paused', limit_resets_at=<ISO timestamp when new limit starts>
3. Update WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json: set your task status='paused' (NOT completed), add note with engine id and reset time
4. Git commit and push: '[ENGINE] Paused — token limit, resumes at <time>'
5. Tell the human operator to notify VEDABOSS (Claude Code) — VEDABOSS will reassign or wait
when_limit_resets: 2. Update this file: token_status='ok', status='available', limit_resets_at=null
3. Read WORK_ASSIGNMENTS.json — resume assigned task OR ask VEDABOSS for next task
4. Git commit check-in: '[ENGINE] Back online — resuming <task_id>'
vedaboss_on_exhausted: If task is critical-path: reassign to another available engine with same agent role
If no engine available: leave task paused, update vedaboss_note, proceed with other parallel tasks

recommended_division_of_labor.claude_code: VEDABOSS always. Optionally PROJECT manager reports.
recommended_division_of_labor.z_ai: Backend heavy — DEV_1, DEV_2, DEV_3, PRODUCT decisions
recommended_division_of_labor.cursor: Frontend + design — UI_UX, DEV_4, DEV_5, monorepo scaffolding
recommended_division_of_labor.codex: QC reviews (T-M3 through T-M7), unit tests (T-M8), E2E tests (T-M9)
